## What does this PR do?


## Type
- [ ] Seed contribution
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Other

## For seed contributions
**Domain:** (coding / research / universal / new domain)
**Solana wallet:** (for token payout)

## Checklist
- [ ] Seed is specific and actionable (not generic advice)
- [ ] Seed is from real experience (not made up)
- [ ] Seed is not a duplicate of an existing seed
- [ ] If adding a new domain file, I also updated `seeds/manifest.md`
